title: Arcomua Anvil
description: Forge/NeoForge version of Arcomua Modpack, with lots of optimizations and QoLs to the vanilla. No content mods and gameplay modifications.
body:
[![Cover](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Arcomua/Arcomua-Modpack/assets/social-image-anvil.png)](#arcomua-anvil)
**Arcomua Anvil** is a modpack mainly designed to improve game performance, gameplay experience, and graphics.

-----

### ⏱️ Enhancement
The ultimate goal of this modpack is to improve the vanilla gaming experience as much as possible without changing the main gameplay and mechanism, no content mods included.

### ⚡ High-Performance
Arcomua Anvil includes a lot of optimization mods. High FPS, low TPS, and fast world loading become possible. 

### ✨ QoL Improvements
Arcomua Anvil includes a lot of QoL mods to make your gameplay more enjoyable and make your eyes comfortable, such as Tweakeroo, MiniHUD, Litematica, Xaero's Map, and [XK Redstone Display resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xk-redstone-display).

### 🌸 Graphics
Arcomua Anvil includes [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) which you can enable in video settings, adds more beautiful effects to your game and fixes a lot of details.

### 🖼️ OptiFine Features
Arcomua Anvil uses Rubidium or Embeddmium but supports almost all OptiFine features.

### 🔧 Bug Fixes
With the community's help, some bugs that were never fixed were finally fixed.

### 🍎 macOS Support
This modpack can run perfectly on macOS and Apple Silicon.

<summary>Simplified Chinese introduction</summary>
